docket_entries.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & DA MOTION TO DETAIN/INTC/ /WIT SWORN DA:NICKOLASISHIMARU/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER FRANCIS COOKE/ /EXHMA:1-PAGE GOOGLE MAP STREET VIEW OF DUC LOI SUPERMARKET AT 2200  MISSION STREET; PEOPLE'S 2,COLOR FULL-BODY PHOTOGRAPH OF MAN WEARING A GRAY JACKET; PEOPLE'S 3, CLOSE-UP COLOR PHOTO OF PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 2/HTA1:1 AND 2/X:DEFENSE MOTION FOR PC17(B) REDUCTION IS DENIED,/X:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS GRANTED,/NB/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC OR THE VICTIM/X:AND WOULD NOT REASONABLY ASSURE THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE AT TRIAL,/X:THE COURT MAKES FURTHER FACTUAL FINDINGS ON THE RECORD,/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/SAORD/SA2:MORGAN G,/SAORD2/SA3:INTERSECTION OF 18TH AND MISSION STREETS/SAORD3/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS RE-REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT IF EARLIER INTERVIEW WAS NOT CONDUCTED WITH AN TIGRIANIN INTERPRETERAS REPRESENTED TO THE COURT BY DEFENSE COUNSEL,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT AND RECEIPT OF ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT REPORT/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/
